nasb.text: Sallu, Amok, Hilkiah and Jedaiah. These were the heads of the priests and their kinsmen in the days of Jeshua.

esv.text: Sallu, Amok, Hilkiah, Jedaiah. These were the chiefs of the priests and of their brothers in the days of Jeshua.

cnv.text: 撒路、亞木、希勒家和耶大雅。這些人在耶書亞的日子作祭司和他們親族的首領。

ccb.text: 撒路、亚木、希勒迦和耶大雅。这些人在耶书亚的时代是祭司和他们弟兄的首领。
